tasks.fmt: deno fmt src/app src/bridge src/testing AGENTS.md README.md docs/ARCHITECTURE.md CHANGELOG.md
tasks.validate: deno fmt --check src/app src/bridge src/testing AGENTS.md README.md docs/ARCHITECTURE.md CHANGELOG.md && deno lint src/app src/bridge src/testing && deno check --allow-import src/app/main.ts src/bridge/index.ts && deno test --allow-import src/testing
